title: I'm messing around!
description: This is a mod where i just mess around (i will port it to other versions if people like it a lot)
body:
### **Purpose and things you should expect**

The purpose of this project is for me to make a stupid little mod where i add whatever i want.
From a microwave to a scuffed warden to an among us boss

This is what you should expect (there are more things)

- A microwave
- A candy dimension
- A fridge
- 2 counters
- A gun
- 3 mobs (1 tameable)
- A fork
- A comically big spoon
- Etc

### **Why you should download this mod**

This mod adds a lot of new stuff to minecraft and it will probably be updated very often

And also, if you really want op stuff, there's a lot of op stuff in this mod. For example: The fork and the spoon are multitools (and they deal a pretty good ammount of damage)

### **How to make the portals to get to the dimensions/doubts**

- Candyland: Honey portal
- Pastaland: Caramel planks portal
- How to get caramel planks: kill the among us boss and place the item it gives you in candyland
